name: Intern in My Heart
original_name: เด็กฝึกหน้าใสเติมหัวใจนายหญิง
overview: Ray is an intern with a special ability to see the true identity of his boss, Rin, who everybody considers evil. However, he'll do everything to win her heart.

trailers.title: เด็กฝึกหน้าใสเติมหัวใจนายหญิง (Intern In My Heart) | Official Trailer | WeTV ORIGINAL
